sourcesContent:
import React, { useState, useEffect } from 'react'; import { motion } from 'framer-motion'; import AnimatedStars from '../components/AnimatedStars'; const Privacy = () => { const [displayedText, setDisplayedText] = useState(''); const [currentSection, setCurrentSection] = useState(0); useEffect(() => { const sections = [ { title: 'Your privacy is important to us.', subtitle: 'Learn how we protect your information.' }, { title: 'Information We Collect', content: 'At Glory Live Church Children\'s Ministry, we collect information to provide better services to our community:' }, { title: 'How We Use Your Information', content: 'We use the information we collect to:' }, { title: 'Information Sharing', content: 'We do not sell, rent, or trade your personal information.' }, { title: 'Data Security', content: 'We implement appropriate security measures to protect your personal information:' }, { title: 'Photos and Media', content: 'From time to time, we may take photos or videos during ministry activities for:' }, { title: 'Your Rights', content: 'You have the right to:' }, { title: 'Children\'s Privacy', content: 'Our ministry is specifically designed for children, and we take extra precautions:' }, { title: 'Contact Information', content: 'If you have questions about this Privacy Policy or need to exercise your rights, please contact us:' }, { title: 'Policy Updates', content: 'We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time.' } ]; const section = sections[currentSection]; const textToType = section.title + (section.subtitle ? ` ${section.subtitle}` : '') + (section.content ? ` ${section.content}` : ''); let charIndex = 0; const typingInterval = setInterval(() => { if (charIndex < textToType.length) { setDisplayedText(textToType.slice(0, charIndex + 1)); charIndex++; } else { clearInterval(typingInterval); setTimeout(() => { if (currentSection < sections.length - 1) { setCurrentSection(currentSection + 1); setDisplayedText(''); } }, 2000); } }, 30); return () => clearInterval(typingInterval); }, [currentSection]); return (
{/* Header */}

Privacy Policy

{displayedText} |

Information We Collect

At Glory Live Church Children's Ministry, we collect information to provide better services to our community:

  • Contact information (name, email, phone number)
  • Children's information (age, grade, special needs)
  • Emergency contact details
  • Event registration information
  • Volunteer applications and background check information

How We Use Your Information

We use the information we collect to:

  • Communicate with parents and guardians about children's ministry activities
  • Organize and manage events and programs
  • Ensure the safety and security of all children in our care
  • Send updates about ministry news and upcoming events
  • Process volunteer applications and maintain required records

Information Sharing

We do not sell, rent, or trade your personal information. We may share information only in the following circumstances:

  • With your explicit consent
  • With ministry volunteers and staff who need the information to perform their duties
  • When required by law or to protect the safety of children
  • With background check services for volunteer screening

Data Security

We implement appropriate security measures to protect your personal information:

  • Secure storage of physical and digital records
  • Limited access to sensitive information
  • Regular security reviews and updates
  • Staff training on privacy and security protocols

Photos and Media

From time to time, we may take photos or videos during ministry activities for:

  • Church website and social media
  • Ministry promotional materials
  • Church newsletters and communications

We will obtain parental consent before using any images that clearly identify children.

Your Rights

You have the right to:

  • Access and review your personal information
  • Request corrections to inaccurate information
  • Withdraw consent for certain uses of your information
  • Request deletion of your information (where legally permitted)

Children's Privacy

Our ministry is specifically designed for children, and we take extra precautions:

  • We only collect information necessary for ministry operations
  • We do not collect information from children without parental consent
  • We maintain strict confidentiality regarding children's information
  • All volunteers undergo background checks and training

Contact Information

If you have questions about this Privacy Policy or need to exercise your rights, please contact us:

Email: childrens@glorylivechurch.com

Phone: (123) 456-7890

Address: Korinjo House, British America, Jos Plateau, Nigeria

Policy Updates

We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. We will notify parents and guardians of any significant changes through our regular communication channels.

Last updated: {new Date().toLocaleDateString()}
); }; export default Privacy;
